channel.title: Home on Madhav's Site
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Madhav's Site

item.title: DDLC End Screen 1
item.description:
Hey,

Ok. So here is what happened so far.

During most of poetry comparisons part, I had chosen to go with the character yuri as my interest. Mainly cus she bad asl.

Now, when Sayori confessed, my choice was to tell her the truth that we were just friends.

After that interaction, yuri had come over to my house to settle the festival preperations, and I noticed the music getting glitchy.

item.title: Locality vs Globality
item.description:
back

9th June 2026

Ooh baby, this is where shit gets real.

What is Locality and Globality btw ?

Ok so think about an operator like derivative at some point $a$. This derivative only requires the behaviour of the function in the neighbourhood of a point like $a = 0$. Hence, we call it local.

We denote this “neighbourhood” by $x \in [a - \epsilon, a + \epsilon]$ or $|x-a| < \epsilon$.

item.title: Music I listen to
item.description:
back

8th June 2026

Hey,

I listen to music. I mostly listen to Lil Tecca and Yeat. I love listening to BNYX and Metro Boomin music as well, but im too tired to link them as well for now.

I also make music, mostly in the styles of the people I listen to. I try to rap but I will never let anyone hear it without 15 SoundGoodizers and Autotune.

Thanks for reading,

Madhav

item.title: My thoughts on physics
item.description:
Hey,

So here’s the thing, we all know the education system is shit. There is going to be a bunch of berating of the education system. Please chicken out if you are a wimp.

Now that we have people with hella spunk, lets talk shit about the education system.

I don’t know what it is, but the little guy in my head craves explanations and rigour in them for everything (I think that’s called curiosity, you ignorant fuck). So when people pull shit off in science or math and give a hand-wavy justification, it pisses me off.

item.title: Operator and Basics
item.description:
back

9th June 2026

What is an Operator ?

An operator can be thought of as a function of functions. To be clearer, it maps a function to another. For example, similar to how $ f(x) $ maps $ x \to y $ as $f(x) = y$, we can use $O$, which is an operator to map $f \to g$ as $O \, f = g$.

Where did this fractional calculus idea come from ?

Well, the fractional calculus story begins with Riemann, who formed a kernel through heuristic methods, which is a complicated way of saying that he made an educated guess as to which what the fractional derivative operator will look like. His work was continued by Liouville, who found a inductive proof of the Riemann operator.

item.title: Prerequisites for POLA
item.description:
back

Hi. So these are some prerequisites if you wanna follow this series of notes.

  • Multivariable Calculus (Atleast till chain-rule of partial derivatives)
  • Newtonian Physics (The three laws, some idea of optics)
  • Electromagnetism (It’s not impossible if you don’t know - I will be explaining some necessary topics)
  • hella spunk (mandatory)

Ok. We got that out of the way. Now let’s get into some basics.

I won’t get into a lot of math in this note - let’s save that for the next one.

item.title: This Website
item.description:
back

8th June 2026

Hey,

Making the website you are reading right now wasn’t a one hit wonder. I went through 2 stages of unfinished basic HTML-CSS crap, 3 stages of anguish and hatred, then migrated to react, and now settled on hugo, a static web-page framework.

This is a much easier way to generate static webpages holding the same type of style and content. I will probably stick with this until there is something really big that I can’t accomplish on this and then migrate to that, and end back up with hugo again.
